untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern detection requires identification of two distinct local minima at similar price levels and a recovery peak (neckline) between them. This multi-point pattern structure cannot be expressed using single-bar indicators and comparison operators. Pattern recognition would require custom pattern detection logic or multi-bar state tracking not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The signal describes a classic chart pattern (Double Bottom) that fundamentally requires pattern recognition capabilities beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons. Entry condition uses neckline breakout as proxy (price crosses above pivot). Exit uses reversal of breakout. Hold period derived from histogram data showing peak activity within 35-56 days. Success rates (41-49% bull, 19-27% bear) and average rise (40%) are documented but not operationalized in rule conditions per AUTHOR_SILENT directives. Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given failure_rate_5pct parameter.
